## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Package

Which package is affected? (e.g., `cache`, `httpclient`, `middleware`)

## Steps to Reproduce

```go
// Minimal code to reproduce the issue.
```

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages or stack traces if applicable.

## Environment

- **Go version**: (e.g., 1.25.4)
- **cat-shared-lib version**: (e.g., v1.4.2)
- **OS**: (e.g., Linux, macOS)
